summary: PrarthnaOS portfolio - both backend and frontend tested. All 6 backend pytest tests pass on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend e2e flows verified across desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Found and fixed one click-bubbling bug in Taskbar.jsx that prevented the Start menu from opening.

issues: Auto-opened My Computer window (positioned at x=60,y=40,w=560,h=520) visually overlaps the first six desktop icons (computer, ai-investor, console, book, contact, gallery). Icons remain technically clickable (force/native DOM), but a human user would have to drag/close the window before they can double-click those icons. Consider offsetting My Computer to the right or placing icons in a column that does not overlap the default window position.

action_items: Optional: reposition default My Computer window or icon column so icons aren't visually covered at boot (only a UX polish; functionally fine).
critical_code_review_comments: Desktop.jsx wrapper has `onClick={() => setStartOpen(false)}`. The Taskbar's start-button click bubbled to this handler and immediately closed the menu. Fixed by adding e.stopPropagation() inside the start-button onClick in Taskbar.jsx. The same pattern (bubbling close) could in future affect any new taskbar control; consider scoping the close-on-click to clicks whose target is the desktop background (e.target === e.currentTarget).

DesktopIcon binds BOTH onClick and onDoubleClick to onOpen. Combined with openApp's idempotent setWindows logic this is fine, but double-firing wastes a renders & plays the chiptune twice on every double-click.

server.py CORS middleware is added AFTER include_router; in Starlette/Starlette-FastAPI this still works (middleware runs around the whole app) but conventional order is middleware-before-router for readability.
Server-side timestamps are stored as ISO strings then parsed back to datetime on GET; consistent and avoids Mongo BSON datetime quirks (good).
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run inserts one TEST_ guestbook entry and one contact_messages doc (uses random uuid emails). No cleanup endpoint exists; volume is negligible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/{root,contact,guestbook,status}. /api/contact and /api/guestbook return 200 (not 201) with the inserted object containing id+timestamp. Validation errors are 422. Frontend: desktop renders only when innerWidth >= 768; My Computer auto-opens after a ~3s boot. Default My Computer window obscures icons 1-6 - prefer programmatic DOM .click() via page.evaluate when automating icon opens, or close window-computer first. data-testids follow kebab-case: icon-*, window-*, window-close-*, taskbar-item-*, start-*, cartridge-*, book-*, investor-tip-next, contact-*, outfit-*, pixel-avatar-*, mobile-*. Avatar images at /avatars/avatar_main.png load OK (no fallback needed in this run).
rca_of_the_issue: Start menu bug: Desktop wrapper has onClick that sets startOpen=false to close start menu when clicking elsewhere. Because the Taskbar (and its start-button) are children of this wrapper, the click event bubbled from the start-button through to the wrapper, closing the menu in the same tick it was opened. Repro: page.click('[data-testid=start-button]'); start-menu never appears in DOM. Fix applied: stopPropagation on the start-button's onClick in /app/frontend/src/os/Taskbar.jsx.
